events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial construction, equipment safety, Sitework & Utilities, observed field condition: riding in bucket. Work actively in progress. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Riding in bucket likely personnel lifted in excavator bucket, prohibited by OSHA. Subpart O (Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Marine Operations) 1926.601(b)(14)? Actually 1926.601(b)(14) says no rider permitted on equipment unless safe seating. Also 1926.602(c)(1)(iv) maybe prohibits work from bucket unless designed. Specifically 1926.602(c)(1)(iv): "No person shall be permitted to ride on any power-operated vehicle unless it is designed to carry passengers." Also 1926.601(b)(14): "No person shall be permitted to ride on equipment not designed for passenger riding." Riding in bucket is high/critical risk, fail. Need fill fields. component_conditions maybe non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source empty? Use "" maybe. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings: personnel riding in excavator bucket, violation of OSHA. actions: stop work, remove personnel, use man lift/scaffold/aerial lift, retrain, inspect. references: OSHA 1926 Subpart O, 1926.601(b)(14), 1926.602(c)(1)(iv). Need ensure JSON valid.

    "Personnel observed riding inside an excavator bucket while the equipment is actively operating.",
    "Buckets are not designed or approved as personnel work platforms; this creates fall, crushing, and tip-over hazards.",
    "Practice violates OSHA equipment passenger and work-platform requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the unsafe operation and direct personnel to exit the bucket.",
    "Prohibit use of excavator buckets for transporting or lifting workers.",
    "Provide a rated personnel lift, aerial work platform, scaffold, or manufacturer-approved work platform as an alternative.",
    "Conduct toolbox talk/retraining on equipment use and fall protection.",
    "Document the violation and notify the site superintendent and safety officer."
  ],
  "rationale": "Riding in an excavator bucket is an unacceptable shortcut. OSHA Subpart O prohibits carrying personnel on equipment not designed for passenger riding and requires approved means for elevating workers. The observed condition presents imminent danger of serious injury or death, so the work fails inspection.",
